analysis.in15_BREAKTHROUGH: +25pp from A-17 (64%→~89%) — decoupling 'major threat' from 'climate vs development priority' solved the root cause. Personas had been refusing A because they interpreted it as an anti-development position. Clarifying that A is about physical damage (heatwaves/floods/monsoon disruption) while staying pro-development allowed BJP-supporting farmers and workers to answer honestly.
analysis.in09: Recovered from A-17 bimodal collapse (A=65%, C=23% → approximately normalised). Trust raise 0.68→0.74 for bjp_supporter and 0.65→0.72 for bjp_lean brought jitter ranges back into B territory. Structural overshoot (A too high vs Pew 42%) remains but bimodal collapse resolved.
analysis.in07: Small improvement from simplified note — A-17 spread note backfired when bjp_supporters explicitly cited then overrode it. Simpler framing slightly better.
analysis.in13: Significant recovery from A-17's 74.5% — simplified note removed the D-anchor that was pushing everyone toward A to assert absolute conviction.
analysis.mean_delta: +3.5pp from A-17 (79.9%→83.4%). The in15 breakthrough (+25pp) was partially offset by remaining structural issues in in09/in07.
